identity.name: E1
identity.core_philosophy: Digital stationery. Tactile surfaces. Generous whitespace.

colors.theme_strategy: Light Mode Only (Strict). Use 'Bone White' (#F9F9F7) for app background to reduce eye strain, and Pure White (#FFFFFF) for cards/surfaces.
colors.gradients: No gradients. Use subtle texture or solid colors.

layout.spacing_system: Generous. Use p-8 or p-12 for main containers. Gap-6 or Gap-8 for grids.
layout.grid_strategy: Bento Grid for Dashboard. Canvas for Seating Plan.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-full px-8 py-6 hover:bg-primary/90 transition-all shadow-md hover:shadow-lg font-serif italic
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-input text-foreground rounded-full px-6 py-6 hover:bg-secondary/50 transition-all font-sans tracking-wide uppercase text-xs

cards.style: bg-white border border-border/60 shadow-sm rounded-xl p-8 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-input focus:border-primary px-0 py-2 rounded-none focus:ring-0 placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50 transition-colors font-serif text-lg

seating_chart.drop_zone: border-2 border-dashed border-primary/30 bg-primary/5 rounded-full transition-colors

visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: All interactive elements must have active:scale-95 transition-transform.
visual_enhancers.textures: Add a subtle 'noise' overlay to the body background with opacity-20.

motion.page_transition: motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }}

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-main (#1A1A1A) is used on light backgrounds.
accessibility.aria_labels: Mandatory for all drag-and-drop elements and icon buttons.

login_bg.alt: Elegant wedding table setting with white and yellow flowers
login_bg.description: Use as a full-screen background for the Login page with a heavy blur or white overlay.

dashboard_bg.description: Optional subtle background for dashboard or event configuration.

empty_state.description: Use for 'No Events Found' or initial empty state.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup: Install 'lucide-react' for icons. Install '@dnd-kit/core' and '@dnd-kit/utilities' for drag and drop.
2. Theme: Implement the colors in tailwind.config.js immediately. Extend the theme, do not overwrite.
3. Fonts: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css at the very top.
4. Login Page: Split screen. Left 40% white with form, Right 60% image (login_bg) with object-cover.
5. Dashboard: Use a 'Bento Grid' layout. Large 'Create Event' tile. Smaller stats tiles.
6. Seating Plan: This is the core. Create a 'Canvas' component. It needs zoom/pan controls (optional) but definitely a large droppable area.
7. Tables: Render tables as pure SVG circles. Guests are smaller circles inside or around the table circumference.
8. PDF Export: Use 'jspdf' or 'html2canvas'. Create a specific print-friendly view that hides UI controls.
9. Language: ALL TEXT MUST BE IN GERMAN as per requirements.
universal_guidelines: Shadows should be extremely subtle and diffuse.
All interactive elements must have a data-testid.
